OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, is present. Represented by Carlos Moran
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Franklin Hickman, is present.
Attorney, Svetlana Rishina , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of OCT-18-2010 is vacated.
